description: Every Bento feature, plus the ones their own CLI does not have, plus a local SQLite store that turns 'who are my top spenders by tag' into a one-liner.

auth_env_var_specs.name: BENTO_PUBLISHABLE_KEY
auth_env_var_specs.description: Basic auth username. Starts with pk_. Available in your Bento dashboard under Settings -> API Keys.

auth_env_var_specs.name: BENTO_SECRET_KEY
auth_env_var_specs.description: Basic auth password. Starts with sk_. Available in your Bento dashboard under Settings -> API Keys. Never expose client-side.

auth_env_var_specs.name: BENTO_SITE_UUID
auth_env_var_specs.description: Bento site identifier. Attached to every request as ?site_uuid= on GETs and in the JSON body on POSTs. Available in your Bento dashboard under Account -> Site Settings.

novel_features.name: Snapshot Diff
novel_features.description: Show exactly which subscribers, tags, fields, or templates changed between two local snapshots since Bento has no since filter.

novel_features.name: Hygiene Pipeline
novel_features.description: Run validation + jesses_ruleset + blacklist + content_moderation in one pass and emit a clean CSV plus a rejected CSV with reasons.

novel_features.name: Purchase Replay
novel_features.description: Dry-run a Vendure order export against the Bento $purchase mapping and show the exact batch payload before sending.

novel_features.name: Trigger Path Lint
novel_features.description: Warn when a payload uses /fetch/commands subscribe but the intent (welcome flow, tag-triggered automation) requires /batch/events to fire automations.

novel_features.name: Churn Risk Score
novel_features.description: Rank subscribers by days-since-last-open/click against your cohort baseline before the next broadcast goes out.

novel_features.name: Win-Back Cohort
novel_features.description: Build a CSV of customers who bought once, lapsed 180+ days, and never opened the last 3 broadcasts.

novel_features.name: Review Trigger Coexist
novel_features.description: Emit a dated Bento event stream for orders shipped 10 days ago, skipping any order Stamped already triggered.

novel_features.name: Pre-Delete Audit
novel_features.description: Show tags, events, revenue, and active automations a subscriber set carries before you file a GDPR data_deletion_request.

novel_features.name: Broadcast What-If
novel_features.description: Estimate audience size, predicted opens, and hygiene-risk count for a draft broadcast before you queue it in the dashboard.

novel_features.name: Tag Drift Report
novel_features.description: Surface tags whose subscriber counts swung more than N% week-over-week, catching misfiring workflows.

novel_features.name: Field Schema Lint
novel_features.description: Diff local custom fields against a Vendure customer-schema file and flag missing, renamed, or type-mismatched fields.

novel_features.name: Cohort FTS
novel_features.description: Full-text search subscriber notes/fields plus structured filters in one query, exportable as CSV.
